commands.cmd: read-only session, route, service, response and test audit

summary: Rejected UI readiness: session, origin, identity ownership, expiry, disclosure and error-hiding boundaries pass, but dynamic profile IDs are not UUID-validated and multibyte over-byte-limit bootstrap secrets can produce 500 instead of a validated 400.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit without returning, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Validate every Nutrition profile route parameter and credential UTF-8 byte length at the HTTP boundary.
